name: LongMemEval
capability_target: VCM context recovery, long-context retrieval/reasoning, temporal/session memory, evidence grounding, and stale/deletion rejection

input_contract.metadata: public benchmark card or private analogue manifest
input_contract.context: long local/private semantic pages, sessions, or document chunks
input_contract.query: context recovery, multi-hop, temporal update, or abstention question
input_contract.evidence: required page ids and provenance, never public answer templates for training
input_contract.memory_system: VCM or baseline memory resolver under equal context budget

output_contract.evidence_precision_recall: selected evidence page quality under budget
output_contract.abstention: unknown, stale, and deleted-memory rejection behavior
output_contract.latency: local retrieval and graph traversal cost
output_contract.residuals: missed retrieval, stale page use, bad update handling, or insufficient evidence

contamination_policy: Public long-context/memory benchmarks are calibration metadata only. Training pressure must come from private analogues, dogfood traces, or governed teacher rows; never train on public prompts, contexts, answers, traces, or templates.
regression_policy: If mastered, demote to regression suite and preserve any failures in residual escrow.

permission_envelope.memory: benchmark-local metadata and task context only
permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, sandboxes, and report writers
permission_envelope.network: forbidden during scoring; catalog import only through license-gated source tools

teacher_role: Only diagnose adapter/source bugs after local smoke fails; do not score or solve benchmark items.
